title: WALL HANGING
excerpt: Your walls deserve more than paint. Give them texture, soul, and handmade art.
materials: Feathers, beads, or dried flowers (optional embellishments)
Wall hook or nail for mounting
tips: Fold all cords in half and attach with a lark's head knot onto the dowel
Mix spiral and square knots for visual texture

videoTutorials.title: DIY MACRAME WALL HANGING | How to macrame | Step by step tutorial| Lanaa studio
